tasks.description: Create grid-internal models in grid/states.py: GridSlot, GridLeg, GridCycleRecord, and derive_phase().
acceptance_criteria: GridSlot is a frozen dataclass representing one grid position with A and B legs.
GridLeg is a frozen dataclass for a single managed grid order (entry or exit), distinct from core OrderRequest/OrderSnapshot.
GridCycleRecord is a frozen dataclass for a completed round-trip (entry+exit) with gross/net P&L and fees.
derive_phase() returns the correct GridPhase (from core/types.py) given a GridSlot's current legs.
No GridPhase redefinition — imports from core.types.
Tests cover derive_phase() for all four phases and edge cases (no legs, partial legs).

tasks.description: Implement pure grid lifecycle transitions in grid/states.py: S0->S1a/S1b->S2->S0 via entry fills and exit fills.
acceptance_criteria: apply_entry_fill() transitions S0->S1a (buy filled) or S0->S1b (sell filled), creating the matching exit leg.
apply_exit_fill() transitions S1a->S0 or S1b->S0 (single-leg cycle complete) or S2->S1a/S1b (one exit fills).
apply_entry_fill() on S1a/S1b transitions to S2 (both legs filled, both exits pending).
All transitions return a new frozen GridSlot plus a list of GridCycleRecord for any completed cycles.
No orphaning logic — that belongs in grid/engine.py.
Tests cover every valid transition path and reject invalid ones.

tasks.description: Implement grid slot sizing in grid/sizing.py: minimum trade size calculation, slot count from capital, remainder handling.
acceptance_criteria: min_slot_size_usd() returns the minimum trade size for a given pair based on Kraken minimums.
calculate_slot_count() divides available capital into the maximum number of minimum-sized slots.
Remainder capital that doesn't fill a full slot is reported but not lost.
All calculations use Decimal, not float.
Tests cover normal cases, edge cases (capital < minimum), and multiple pair minimums.

tasks.description: Implement grid accounting in grid/accounting.py: cycle P&L booking, cumulative tracking, parent position risk linkage.
acceptance_criteria: book_cycle() takes a GridCycleRecord and updates cumulative P&L (frozen dataclass, returns new instance).
GridAccountingSummary tracks total_cycles, total_profit_usd, total_fees_usd, and net_pnl_usd.
risk_adjustment() returns a Decimal representing how grid P&L should adjust the parent position's risk score (positive P&L reduces risk, negative increases it).
All calculations use Decimal.
Tests cover profitable cycles, losing cycles, fee handling, and the risk adjustment formula.

tasks.description: Implement grid engine orchestration in grid/engine.py: activation, deactivation, profit redistribution, capacity headroom, and orphan detection hooks.
acceptance_criteria: activate_grid() creates initial grid slots from sizing and places entry orders via action list.
deactivate_grid() stops new entries and returns actions to let existing orders fill naturally.
redistribute_profits() redistributes accumulated profit across active slots (compounding).
headroom_budget() calculates how many grid orders can be placed given remaining Kraken order capacity and the configurable GRID_HEADROOM_PCT.
detect_orphans() identifies grid legs that have been stuck beyond a configurable timeout and returns them for engine-level repair.
All functions are pure (take state in, return new state + actions out) where possible.
Tests cover activation, deactivation, redistribution math, headroom calculation, and orphan detection.
